inline: This is a successor execution under a completed observer onboarding root.
The compiled ContractRuntime guide is the source of the next legal action.
Observer may record hotfix entry and under-action evidence only; independent QA must author independent_verification evidence.
Do not author QA evidence as observer and do not rebind the root onboarding execution.

stages.description: Observer records the human-approved hotfix entry reason.

lines.description: Human-approved hotfix entry with successor contract lineage.

stages.description: Observer records bounded under-hotfix action evidence.

lines.description: Summary of the bounded action taken under the hotfix profile.

stages.description: Independent QA verifies the hotfix result.

lines.description: QA-authored independent verification for the hotfix successor execution.

stages.description: Observer records close-ready only after independent QA evidence.

lines.description: Observer close-ready evidence after independent QA accepts the hotfix.
